rationale: Abstract X precisely names the gap (no head-to-head RCT of PFA vs. contact-force RF), structures endpoints with full methodological detail, and closes with a calibrated forward-looking conclusion, whereas Abstract Y offers a vague gap statement and a content-free conclusion.
loser_weakness: Abstract Y most lacked a specific, falsifiable knowledge gap and delivered a conclusion so generic ('aims to provide critical insights') that it conveyed no information about the trial's contribution.
